relaxation.name: Relaxation
relaxation.description: Helps with sleep, reduces anxiety, and calms the nervous system.

anxiety_relief.name: Anxiety Relief
anxiety_relief.description: Exhale longer than inhale — stabilizes breathing and reduces stress.

concentration.name: Concentration
concentration.description: Box breathing — helps focus and maintain calmness.

balance.name: Balance
balance.description: Even breathing — harmonizes the heart and mind, stabilizing the rhythm.

energy.name: Energy
energy.description: Short, active exhales — activates the body and clears the mind.

irritation_release.name: Irritation Release
irritation_release.description: Helps release anger — long exhale with a soft sound.

creative_flow.name: Creative Flow
creative_flow.description: Soft rhythm for the flow state — maintains attention without tension.

phase.hold_in: PAUSE (At the top of the inhale)

commands.help_desc: Show the list of commands and help

message.select_new_practice: When needed, choose a new breathing practice:

error.sender_id_missing: ❌ runBreathingCycle: Failed to get sender ID (ctx.from).
